abstract.text: Credentials management utility for securely storing and retrieving the user’s credentials from the Keychain.

inlineContent.text: The Credentials Manager is not thread-safe, except for the following methods:
To avoid concurrency issues, do not call its non thread-safe methods and properties from different threads

abstract.text: Retrieves API credentials from the Keychain and automatically renews them using the refresh token if the access
token is expired. Otherwise, the subscription will complete with the retrieved API credentials as they are
still valid.
Calls the
endpoint to revoke the refresh token and then clears the credentials if the request
was successful. Otherwise, the credentials are not cleared and the subscription completes with an error.
Clears credentials stored in the Keychain.
Exchanges the refresh token for a session transfer token that can be used to perform web single sign-on (SSO).

Retrieves credentials from the Keychain and automatically renews them using the refresh token if the access
token is expired. Otherwise, the retrieved credentials will be returned via the success case as they are still
valid. Renewed credentials will be stored in the Keychain.

credential access.
